# PERF-108 negative: sort.Search hoisted out of the loop
lang: go
file: PERF-108-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "sort"

func Lookup(values []int, queries []int) []int {
	// Pre-sort once (or rely on the caller to do so). The
	// per-query search uses an index into a sorted slice.
	sort.Ints(values)
	out := make([]int, len(queries))
	for i, q := range queries {
		idx := sort.SearchInts(values, q)
		out[i] = idx
	}
	return out
}
